calendar.matters:
Pet. For Order Accepting Resignations Of Cotrustees With Respect To The Bypass Trust, Appting Cotrustees For The Bypass Trust, & Authorizing Atty Fees
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Off Calendar

Pet. For Order Accepting Resignations Of Cotrustees With Respect To The Bypass Trust, Appting Cotrustees For The Bypass Trust, & Authorizing Atty Fees
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Continued To Jun-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Laurie Shigekuni in Propria Persona for herself and Stanton Gong. Fatima Evans (via court call) for (remainder beneficiary) Regents of the UC.

Ms. Evans stated that she filed a response yesterday, that Ms. Shigekuni filed a 1st amended petition this morning, that it has not been served, that she would like a private fiduciary appointed and that if Ms. Shikegumi is appointed there is risk of the duties being violated. Ms. Shigekuni stated that Ms. Minami is the only income beneficiary, that she has received receipts from the other beneficiaries, that the UC is only a 9% remainder beneficiary, that the amended petition was filed to remove the possibility of conflict of interest, that Ms. Minami has agreed that distributions would only be made out of the bypass trust with court authority and that her and Ms. Evans tried to reach a stipulated agreement but were not successful. Ms. Shigekuni also stated that she is requesting $5,000.00 in fees which she has reduced from $8,000.00. The matter is being bifurcated with the issue of the appointment of successor trustees and the request for $5,000.00 in attorney's fees being taken under submission. The remaining issues in the amended petition for order accepting resignations of co-trustees, etc., was continued to June 1, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Pet. For Order Accepting Resignations Of Cotrustees With Respect To The Bypass Trust, Appting Cotrustees For The Bypass Trust, & Authorizing Atty Fees
Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Continued To Mar-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Laurie Shigekuni for Atsumi Minami (Petitioner) and as Trustee with her husband. Fatima Evans appeared by Court Call for The Regents of the University of California.

Ms. Evans stated that they would like to see an accounting and that dual compensation is still an issue. Ms. Shigekuni stated that she has a draft of the accounting going back to 2007, that the accountant is working on finishing the accounting and she intents to submit the accounting to Ms. Evans for review. Ms. Evans stated that they want to work out any additional issues. The Court is inclined to take the matter under submission after 30 days. The matter is continued to March 25, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)
